sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72874" key="o)ktwkaitriako/ntedron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτωκαιτριακόντεδρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72874.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solid figure with thirty-eight faces,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2p.537H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
